scripts.test:v1: cross-env UI_VERSION=1 npx playwright test tests/traditional/ --reporter=list
scripts.test:v2: cross-env UI_VERSION=2 npx playwright test tests/traditional/ --reporter=list
scripts.test:v2:healing: cross-env UI_VERSION=2 npx playwright test tests/traditional/ --reporter=./utils/healingReporter.js,list
